seedanceSegments.title: Sauce simmer hook
seedanceSegments.description: Texture-first scarlet enchilada sauce macro, whisk payoff, ladle ribbon; brief island and dish prep beats.
seedanceSegments.prompt: Use @KitchenIslandDefault for global Licorn kitchen identity in any wider shot. Use @InductionCloseup for the cooktop surface context. Use @InductionWide only if a single medium safety stitch is needed. Use @SaucepanLarge for pan silhouette. Use @Whisk for whisk tool identity. Use @SimmeringRedEnchiladaSurface only as the target sauce skin reference: deep red, slow bubbles, chili-oil micro shimmer, no tomato chunks, no readable text. Use @CharacterSheet and @PoseTopDown when hands appear. Generate exactly 7 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 5 seconds, no slow motion, no soft transitions, no extra shots. Output 1080:1920 vertical. TikTok-style food ASMR, macro-first, no text on screen. Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music; only kitchen ASMR synced to cuts. Mandatory timing: 0.0-0.8s extreme macro sauce bubbles breaking; 0.8-1.5s whisk drags a glossy trench that refills; 1.5-2.1s tight surface swirl with spice specks; 2.1-2.7s single medium context on saucepan over heat; 2.7-3.2s greased ceramic baking dish oil sheen brush; 3.2-4.1s ladle lifts heavy sauce ribbon; 4.1-5.0s sauce falls in thick rope. Global negatives: no on-screen text, no recipe numbers, no voice, no music, no labels on appliances, no cinematic slow-mo. Mandatory audio: simmer blips, whisk hiss, ribbon slap.

seedanceSegments.continuity: Opening segment; sauce reference locks color and bubble scale before savory pan work.

seedanceSegments.audioPrompt: simmer blips; whisk metal; thick pour slap

seedanceSegments.title: Sizzling filling
seedanceSegments.description: Oil shimmer, onion sizzle, chicken and chiles cook-through, beans folded; steam and moisture beats.
seedanceSegments.prompt: Use @KitchenIslandDefault for global kitchen identity. Use @InductionCloseup for sauté surface. Use @SaucepanLarge for pan read. Use @Spatula for folding tool. Use @Sieve as the black beans drain reference shape when beans appear. Use @CharacterSheet and @PoseTopDown for hands. Generate exactly 9 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 6 seconds, no extra shots, 1080:1920 vertical. Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music. Mandatory timing: 0.0-0.7s oil shimmer pool; 0.7-1.3s onion dice hits oil with sizzle pop; 1.3-1.9s spatula toss glassy onion; 1.9-2.5s chicken and green chiles tumble in; 2.5-3.2s pink surfaces shrinking; 3.2-3.8s steam veil with nearly cooked chicken; 3.8-4.4s wider beat with beans in sieve beading; 4.4-5.3s beans fold without mash; 5.3-6.0s glossy resting filling. Global negatives: no raw pink chicken in final beat, no faces talking, no text, no music. Mandatory audio: sizzle, spatula scrape, steam rush, soft fold.

Global negatives: no raw pink chicken in final beat, no faces talking, no text, no music. Mandatory audio: sizzle, spatula scrape, steam rush, soft fold.
seedanceSegments.continuity: Carries heat language from sauce segment into protein transformation.
seedanceSegments.risk: Undercooked chicken reads wrong; final beat must be fully opaque crumb.
seedanceSegments.audioPrompt: hot pan sizzle; spatula; steam fold

seedanceSegments.title: Roll and pack
seedanceSegments.description: Overhead tortilla saucing, filling, cheese inside, tight roll, pack into casserole, sauce flood, cheese blizzard.
seedanceSegments.prompt: Use @KitchenIslandDefault for identity. Use @KitchenIslandOverhead for overhead workstation continuity. Use @Spoon only for back-of-spoon sauce spread silhouette. Use @FilledUnbakedEnchiladaCasserole only as fragile geometry reference: parallel flour-tortilla rolls tucked in greased rectangular ceramic, valleys open, tops not yet blistered—no single burrito wedge floating. Use @CharacterSheet and @PoseTopDown for hands. Generate exactly 9 shots, hard cuts, total 6 seconds, 1080:1920 vertical. Integrated audio only. Mandatory timing: 0.0-0.8s workstation context without sterile ingredient parade; 0.8-1.5s spoon paints two controlled red stripes; 1.5-2.1s filling row and inner cheese snowfall; 2.1-2.7s roll tuck with flex wrinkles; 2.7-3.3s seam down placement into tray slot; 3.3-3.9s pack matches reference parallels; 3.9-4.6s sauce pours into troughs; 4.6-5.4s uneven cheese blizzard atop; 5.4-6.0s static pre-bread money frame. Negatives: no text, no tutorial voice, no loose floating tortilla CGI, no music. Mandatory audio: sticky drag, soft roll squeak, pour glug, cheese hush.

seedanceSegments.title: Bake blister
seedanceSegments.description: Tray to oven, conservative melt hint, hard cut to blistered reference top, edge toast macro, steam beat.
seedanceSegments.prompt: Use @KitchenIslandDefault for kitchen identity. Use @OvenWide for tray approach. Use @OvenCloseup for interior macro. Use @BakedEnchiladasMoltenTop only as baked target reference: blistered cheese skin, sauce reduced in channels, parallel roll backs readable—no soup flood. Generate exactly 5 shots, hard cuts, total duration 5 seconds, 1080:1920 vertical. Integrated audio only. Mandatory timing: 0.0-1.1s tray translation toward oven; 1.1-2.0s conservative glimpse of softening cheese; 2.0-2.2s hard cut; 2.2-3.8s blistered molten surface matching reference; 3.8-4.6s tortilla rim pale gold crust lip; 4.6-5.0s steam puff. Negatives: no fake hyperlapse morph, no charcoal burn, no text, no music. Mandatory audio: rack slide hum, faint cheese tick, steam hiss.

seedanceSegments.title: Cool toppings contrast
seedanceSegments.description: Dish rest beat, cilantro rain, sour cream river, avocado fan, optional cotija.
seedanceSegments.prompt: Use @KitchenIslandDefault for identity. Use @KitchenIslandOverhead for topping macros. Use @Spoon for cream drag tool if needed. Use @CharacterSheet and @PoseTopDown for hands. Generate exactly 5 shots, hard cuts, total 5 seconds, 1080:1920 vertical. Integrated audio only. Mandatory timing: 0.0-0.9s dish settle with residual bubble; 0.9-1.9s cilantro scatter; 1.9-3.0s sour cream dollop smear; 3.0-4.0s avocado fan place; 4.0-5.0s cotija crumble snow optional. Negatives: no text, no music, no speech, no lime squeeze squirt toward lens. Mandatory audio: leaf flutter, cream squelch, soft pat.

seedanceSegments.title: Serve and stretch
seedanceSegments.description: Spatula lift, fork cross-section, disciplined modest cheese pull reference.
seedanceSegments.prompt: Use @KitchenIslandDefault for identity. Use @KitchenIslandOverhead for lift and bite macros. Use @Spatula for service tool. Use @EnchiladaCrossSectionPull only as cut-state reference: modest cheese threads, visible chicken-bean strata, red sauce meniscus—no rubber-band CGI. Use @CharacterSheet and @PoseTopDown for hands. Generate exactly 4 shots, hard cuts, total 5 seconds, 1080:1920 vertical. Integrated audio only. Mandatory timing: 0.0-1.2s spatula lifts pair with sauce drip; 1.2-2.6s fork compression shows layers; 2.6-3.6s short cheese pull matches reference; 3.6-5.0s relaxed bite scoop. Negatives: no endless cheese elastic, no text, no music, no speech. Mandatory audio: metal slide, fibrous tear, snap threads.

seedanceSegments.title: Kitchen satisfied outro
seedanceSegments.description: Character visible with finished platter in Licorn island context; silent satisfaction.
seedanceSegments.prompt: Use @KitchenIslandDefault for environment identity. Use @CharacterSheet for Licorn character look continuity. Use @PoseThreeQuarterLeft for satisfied standing hold of serving dish. Generate exactly 2 shots, hard cuts, total duration 4 seconds, 1080:1920 vertical. Integrated audio only. Mandatory timing: 0.0-2.2s character presents finished enchilada dish with visible steam; 2.2-4.0s soft expression beat—no mouth dialogue, no wave to camera gimmick. Negatives: no speech, no voiceover, no music, no on-screen text, no logo reads. Mandatory audio: faint dish clink, ambient kitchen texture only.
